variants.author: Claude Opus 4.8
variants.change: Fills DONCHIAN's missing Turtle STRUCTURAL stop: stop placed at the opposite exit_channel_len-low channel instead of the base short stop_lookback rolling low. New knob exit_channel_len; grid 24.
variants.contract_limit: TRUE trailing opposite-channel exit (re-evaluated every bar) needs an engine-core change to simulate_slice (Faz 3b, approval-gated) and would affect all strategies; not done.
variants.next: two-stage validation (broad discovery -> narrow pre-registered confirmation); promote nothing without robust_final
